scripts.build: echo "Run package-specific builds (e.g. npm run build -w apps/web)"
scripts.lint: node -e "const fs=require("fs");const p=require("path");function c(d){for(const f of fs.readdirSync(d)){const fp=p.join(d,f);if(fs.statSync(fp).isDirectory()&&!f.startsWith(".")){c(fp);continue}if(/\.js$/.test(f))try{new Function(fs.readFileSync(fp,"utf8"))}catch(e){console.error(fp+": "+e.message);process.exit(1)}}}c(".")"
